name: axr
description: Agent eXecution Readiness scoring for repositories. Scores a repo against the AXR rubric and produces machine-readable and human-readable reports.

commands.name: axr
commands.description: Run a full AXR assessment on the current repository

commands.name: axr-check
commands.description: Run AXR assessment for a single dimension (tests_ci, docs_context, change_surface, safety_rails, structure, tooling, execution_visibility, workflow_realism)

commands.name: axr-diff
commands.description: Compare current AXR score to the most recent previous run and surface changes
